api_contract.notes: Protected API endpoints tested through direct Rust handlers and live curl probes. security.notes: Unauthenticated and malformed Authorization/Cookie probes did not bypass auth, did not reflect injected token/script values, and did not leak cookie values or stack traces. OPTIONS returned 405 without Access-Control-Allow-Origin for https://evil.com.
